upgradeNotes: All data files are additive — no deletions or schema changes
New JSON state files (m6-*, m6b-*) are created on first write — no manual migration needed
Old auth tokens in data/m6-auth-tokens.json will still be read — no invalidation
billing.json remains the same — m6b-billing-ext.json is a new additive file
vault-index.json and vault secrets untouched — Vault data is intact
All existing routes preserved — new routes added under /beta/*, /cbeta/*

breakingChanges.change: Registration now requires invite code + email verification
breakingChanges.impact: New users must have valid invite code; email must be verified before login

breakingChanges.change: Password reset now uses real 1h token (was stub)
breakingChanges.impact: Old stub reset links are invalid

breakingChanges.action: Monitor /beta/status — extend cap in betaReadiness.cjs when ready

nonBreakingAdditions: POST /cbeta/* — 38 new routes for Closed Beta Ops
POST /beta/* — 20 new routes for Beta Readiness
POST /alpha/* — 17 new routes for Alpha Program
Launch readiness report with top-20 issues, top-10 risks

dataPreservation.users: INTACT — new email verification state added
dataPreservation.invites: INTACT — new revoked status added to existing invite records

freshInstallSteps: cp .env.example .env && nano .env  # fill in required vars
POST /co3/invites/bulk  # generate first beta invite codes
upgradeSteps: bash deploy/update.sh  # pulls code + backup + rebuild + pm2 reload
All new state files initialize on first API call
